input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.2.2
            TITLE: the endurance course will be designed with the following specifications.  average speed

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.2.2: The Endurance course will be designed with the following specifications.  Average speed
D.12.2.2 The Endurance course will be designed with the following specifications.  Average speed 
should be 48 km/hr to 57 km/hr with top speeds of approximately 105 km/hr.   
a. Straights:  No longer than 77 m with hairpins at both ends  
b. Straights:  No longer than 61 m with wide turns on the ends 
c. Constant Turns:  30 m to 54 m diameter 
d. Hairpin Turns:  9 m minimum outside diameter (of the turn) 
e. Slaloms: Cones in a straight line with 9 m to 15 m spacing 
f. Miscellaneous:  Chicanes, multiple turns, decreasing radius turns, etc. 
g. Minimum track width:  4.5 m 
h. Designated passing zones at several locations

final_answer: The Endurance course will be designed with the following specifications. Average speed should be 48 km/hr to 57 km/hr with top speeds of approximately 105 km/hr. a. Straights: No longer than 77 m with hairpins at both ends b. Straights: No longer than 61 m with wide turns on the ends c. Constant Turns: 30 m to 54 m diameter d. Hairpin Turns: 9 m minimum outside diameter (of the turn) e. Slaloms: Cones in a straight line with 9 m to 15 m spacing f. Miscellaneous: Chicanes, multiple turns, decreasing radius turns, etc. g. Minimum track width: 4.5 m h. Designated passing zones at several locations
